items.title: Trump exerts iron grip on Republican Party with Massie defeated
items.summary: Victory over a Republican rebel in Kentucky shows the president's strength but his power comes with risks for the midterms.

items.title: Man who murdered teen TikTok star in Pakistan gets death sentence
items.summary: Sana Yousaf's murder highlights a pattern of violence against women in Pakistan, activists say.

items.title: 'Ebola has tortured us': Fear grips eastern DR Congo as deadly virus spreads
items.summary: The health minister has acknowledged that medics are playing catch-up with the virus after being slow to detect it.

items.title: Trump's Greenland envoy faces uphill battle on mission to make 'friends'
items.summary: Jeff Landry's visit to the territory, a semi-autonomous part of Denmark, has touched a nerve among some Greenlanders.

items.title: Woman dies after falling into uncovered New York City manhole
items.summary: It's believed the manhole cover on the city's Fifth Avenue was dislodged by a truck  minutes before incident.

items.title: Son of Mango boss arrested over father's fatal fall from cliff
items.summary: Isak, 71, died in December 2024 after falling from a ravine while walking in the Montserrat mountains near Barcelona.

items.title: Father-of-eight killed in San Diego mosque shooting hailed as hero
items.summary: Security guard Amin Abdullah, one of three killed in the attack, was described as "a shining light".

items.title: Nigeria arrests former minister in hiding after corruption conviction
items.summary: The former power minister was sentenced to 75 years in jail in absentia earlier this month.

items.title: Singer Patrick Bruel denies wave of sexual assault allegations in France
items.summary: Among Bruel's latest accusers is well-known TV and radio presenter Flavie Flament, who alleges he raped her in 1991.

items.title: Thailand cuts visa-free stay period for more than 90 countries including UK
items.summary: Many visitors who have been exempt for 60 days will soon have to apply for a visa after 30 days.

items.title: Key people smuggler arrested after BBC uncovered identity
items.summary: The 28-year-old's network is thought to have transported thousands of illegal migrants into the UK.

items.title: Estonia says Nato jet shot down drone over its territory
items.summary: Estonia suspects the drone was a Ukrainian projectile knocked off course by Russian electronic jamming.

items.title: Ebola outbreak may be spreading faster than first thought, WHO doctor warns
items.summary: Hundreds of cases are suspected in central Africa but experts fear the actual number may be much higher.

items.title: Two bodies of missing Italians recovered from inside Maldives cave
items.summary: The two were among four divers located in the furthest chamber in the cave and their bodies were recovered by specialist divers.

items.title: Uncontrolled California wildfires seen from space
items.summary: Some 750 firefighters are tackling the uncontrolled blazes supported by water-dropping helicopters.

items.title: Jackson Pollock painting sells for record $181m at auction
items.summary: The Abstract Expressionist's Number 7A, 1948 painting is now his most expensive artwork ever sold at auction.

items.title: Two dead in Spain shooting, with babies reportedly among injured
items.summary: Police say a 25-year-old man is suspected of killing his parents and injuring four others in southern Spain.

items.title: Tasmanian government apologises over stolen body parts scandal
items.summary: An investigation found that 177 human specimens from dozens of bodies were secretly kept by a museum.

items.title: Starbucks Korea sacks CEO over controversial 'Tank Day' promotion
items.summary: Starbucks withdrew the campaign for its drink tumblers after many said it referenced a bloody crackdown.

items.title: Trump administration unveils $1.8bn fund to compensate his allies as he drops tax lawsuit
items.summary: The settlement will go towards individuals who allege they were subjected to unfair investigations.

items.title: Trump endorses Paxton in Texas, gambling on a challenger with baggage in a crucial race
items.summary: Trump's move dismayed Senate Republicans, many of whom have served with the Texan for decades.

items.title: What we know about the San Diego mosque attack suspects
items.summary: Authorities say the teenage suspects shared a "broad hatred" of multiple religions and racial groups.

items.title: Selling children to survive: Afghan fathers forced to make impossible choices
items.summary: In Afghanistan today, a staggering three in four people cannot meet their basic needs.

items.title: Victim or enabler? Epstein girlfriend who could face questions despite plea deal
items.summary: Nadia Marcinko is relatively unknown but may soon be called before US legislators.

items.title: What is Ebola and why is stopping the latest outbreak so difficult?
items.summary: An outbreak of Ebola in DR Congo involves a rare strain and is in an area affected by conflict.

items.title: What really holds China and Russia together
items.summary: The relationship endures despite a power imbalance, with both sides recognising that it is too important to fail.

items.title: Anti-government demonstrators and police clash in Bolivia
items.summary: Protesters have been calling for the president to resign after weeks-long unrest.

items.title: 'I sold it for over £1k': Swatch launch sparks 'chaotic' scenes
items.summary: Some shoppers have been trying to resell a new line of watches priced at £335 each for up to £16,000.

items.title: Moment two fighter jets collide mid-air at US air show
items.summary: Four crew members safely ejected from US Navy jets and are in a stable condition after the collision.

items.title: Eurovision winner Dara arrives to screaming fans in Bulgaria
items.summary: The 27-year-old's tune Bangaranga won Bulgaria its first ever title in the song contest.

items.title: Lights, camera, Bangaranga: Highlights from Eurovision
items.summary: Bulgarian singer Dara stormed to victory in the contest, while Ukraine broke the record for the longest note ever sung at Eurovision.
